subcodes.first_line: God hath verily heard thy condition, whereupon He maketh mention of thee through His grace. There is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمع الله ما انت علیه اذا یذکرک بفضل من عنده لا اله الا هو العزیز القادر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @presence of; reunion with God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @personal instructions
